gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers are sharing quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students are clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps; meanwhile, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; at the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards.

Furthermore, career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
